creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

unluckily the distfile can't be fetched, here is build log from tinderbox:

http://people.freebsd.org/~madpilot/awstats-7.1%2c1.log

Perhaps the distfile was rerolled. Could you please check and submit an 
updated patch?

Thanks!

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
